name: Columbia "Sawed Off" Mini Automatic Taper
description_full:
The Columbia "Sawed Off" Automatic Taper

Is a precision-built tool that is back by popular demand. This tool will tape flats and angles effortlessly year after year. From less drag in the corners to easily remove the cap for cleaning, this tool will not let you down. A hard-anodized tube eliminates the track lines that occur on so many other tools. Stainless steel side plates and cable drum and creaser arms offer a lifetime of corrosion resistance. Every taper comes standard with an adjustable brake and quick release for tape changing. At 39", this taper is perfect for tight spaces such as stairwells, closets, scaffold, and low ceilings. If you are serious about taping and care how a taper feels and performs this is the one for you.

name: Columbia 10" Automatic Assist Drywall Tool Flat Box
description_full:
The Columbia Automatic Flat Boxes

Reduce the need to push the compound on to the wall. By engaging, the box springs put pressure on the compound chamber requiring only a light push to operate the box. Well-built and fine-tuned to offer great flat joints for years. We have been told for years that our boxes are the smoothest finishing and easiest to push. We are very proud to get this feedback and will make sure that every Finishing Box we make exceeds your expectations.

name: Columbia 10" Drywall Flat Finishing Box
description_full:
Columbia 10" Drywall Flat Finishing Box

Is the most common selling size of flat box for the first coat, in the US market. It works great for running flat joints and butt seams. Easy open door plate makes for very easy clean up and will fit on all major brands of flat box handles. 5 Year Columbia Warranty.

name: Columbia 10" Fat Boy Drywall Flat Finishing Box
description_full:
Columbia 10" Fat Boy Drywall Flat Finishing Box

Holds 30% more mud than the standard Columbia 10" Flat Box. It works great for running the first coat on flat joints and butt seams. With 30% more mud, you can go longer distances without having to fill it up at the pump. Easy open door plate makes for very easy clean up and will fit on all major brands of flat box handles. 5 Year Columbia Warranty.

name: Columbia 10" Inside Track Fat Boy Flat Box
description_full:
With the Columbia 10" Fat Boy Boxes

You can hold 30% more mud compared to the standard flat boxes. This box will also fit all major brands of flat box handles. The inside track boxed feature the wheels mounted on the inside of the side plates. This feature is excellent for finishing butt joints. Very similar to the design of the Blueline/Premier boxes.

name: Columbia 10" Tomahawk Smoothing Blade
description_full:
The Columbia Tomahawk set of Smoothing Blades

Is the most durable set on the market today. With no plastic pieces, the Tomahawk doesn't snap under pressure. And because the blades use a Flat Box handle, there are no plastic adaptors that will break with the weight of the larger blades. This also increases the stability and your ability to adjust the angle of attack while in motion. The Columbia Tomahawk will change what the industry expects from a professional grade Smoothing Blade.

The Columbia Tomahawk will change what the industry expects from a professional grade Smoothing Blade.

name: Columbia 12" Drywall Flat Finishing Box
description_full:
The Columbia 12" Drywall Flat Finishing Box

Is a high-quality tool for quickly and efficiently finishing drywall surfaces. Made from durable materials, this finishing box is built to withstand frequent use and delivers consistent results every time. Its precision-engineered parts ensure a smooth and even application of joint compound, leaving a perfect finish without any air pockets or ridges.

This finishing box has a 12" blade that covers a large area, allowing you to finish larger surfaces in less time. It is lightweight, making it easy to handle and maneuver, even when working on ceilings or walls. The blade is adjustable and can be set to a range of thicknesses, depending on the requirements of your project.

The Columbia 12" Drywall Flat Finishing Box is also designed for easy cleaning, with a removable lid that makes it easy to access and clean the internal components. Its sturdy construction, and advanced features make it an ideal choice for professional contractors and DIY enthusiasts who want a flawless finish on their drywall projects.

5-Year Columbia Warranty.
description_short: The Columbia 12" Drywall Flat Finishing Box is a high-quality tool for quickly and efficiently finishing drywall surfaces. Made from durable materials, this finishing box is built to withstand frequent use and delivers consistent results every time. Its precision-engineered parts ensure a smooth and even application of joint compound, leaving a perfect finish without any air pockets or ridges.
